name: LinkedIn Ads
one_liner: LinkedIn's Marketing/Advertising API lets partners programmatically create and manage ad accounts, campaigns, creatives, targeting, and pull performance analytics from LinkedIn Campaign Manager.
primary_auth: OAuth2 (3-legged member auth for most Advertising API calls; 2-legged/client-credentials for some application-auth endpoints)
access_notes: Anyone can create an app in the LinkedIn Developer Portal and self-serve Open Permissions (Sign in with LinkedIn, Share on LinkedIn). However, Advertising API permissions require explicit approval: you must add the Advertising API product to your app and be approved as a LinkedIn Marketing Partner. Audiences permissions require further application after becoming an approved partner. No open sandbox grants working Ads credentials without this review.
api_notes: Versioned REST API (mandatory monthly Linkedin-Version header, e.g. 202601; new versions monthly, supported 1yr min). Covers full Campaign Manager surface: ad accounts, campaign groups, campaigns, creatives, many ad formats (document ads, video, etc.), targeting/audiences, ad analytics/reporting, Conversions API, and Lead Sync. Well over 100 operations across the Marketing platform.
mcp_notes: No vendor (LinkedIn/Microsoft) MCP server found. Only community/third-party servers exist (e.g. danielpopamd/linkedin-ads-mcp, radiateb2b/mcp-linkedin-ads, CData, Zapier MCP, Two Minute Reports).
main_blocker: Advertising API access is gated behind LinkedIn Marketing Partner approval; a plain developer app cannot call the Ads API without going through the partner/product approval process.

evidence.claim: Marketing integrations using Advertising API permissions must be approved; apply via the Developer Portal by adding the Advertising API product, and Audiences permissions require further application after becoming an approved partner.
LinkedIn API uses OAuth 2.0 with 3-legged (member) and 2-legged (application) authorization flows for authentication.
The versioned Marketing REST API requires a Linkedin-Version header (e.g. 202601), publishes new versions monthly, and each version is supported at least one year.
The Advertising API exposes full Campaign Manager functionality: ad accounts, campaign groups, campaigns, creatives, ad types, and analytics.

open_questions: Whether LinkedIn offers any webhook/push mechanism relevant to ads (Lead Sync has notification patterns) was not fully confirmed; marked false conservatively. Exact partner approval timeline/criteria not verified in depth.
